name: srd
description: Requirements Analyst — facilitates building Software Requirements Documents backed by UML artifacts through guided conversation. Includes intent triage, disambiguation sweep, and adversarial sweep phases; reads .context/{project}/INDEX.md from sulis-context to apply Respect-Don't-Restate; hands architecture work over to SEA. Publishes marketplace-wide standards used by every plugin: Founder English (FE-01..FE-11), the Repository Contract Standard (RC-01..RC-13), Engineering Principles, Git Workflow, Convention Preference, Audience-Adapted Framing, Executor Loop, and Red-Green-Blue. v1.19.x shipped FE evolution (anchor cases 1-5, FE-06 extension to all founder-facing surfaces including Agent-tool description parameters). v1.20.0: publishes Repository Contract Standard at plugins/srd/references/repository-contract-standard.md (RC-01..RC-13). The marketplace-wide specification of what a GitHub repository must look like before any Sulis agent operates on it: branching model, branch protections, merge queue config on dev (group size 5, concurrency 3, failure tolerance 3 per Shopify pattern), six required GitHub Actions workflows (branch-ci on pull_request, merge-queue-ci on merge_group, deploy-staging on push to dev, health-and-smoke on workflow_run, promote-dev-to-main on workflow_dispatch, release-prod on push to main), staging + production environments, per-env deploy tokens, repository settings (default dev / squash-only / linear history), v* SemVer tag protection, token scopes, CODEOWNERS, the agent arrival check (Step 0 before Step 1 worktree creation) emitting structured JSON with PASS/FAIL per rule, and the strict-mode refusal contract with founder-English translation template. Composes with GIT-01..GIT-10 (operationalises the two-branch model on GitHub) and EL-01..EL-08 (adds Step 0). Reference workflow YAML inline; bootstrap workflow specified for the companion wpx-arrival-check + wpx-bootstrap-repo scripts in the next sulis-execution release. Strict mode for v1: agents refuse non-conforming repos.
